globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' unpkg.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com unpkg.com; img-src 'self' data: widgets.guidestar.org https://www.google-analytics.com https://www.google.com https://google.com; frame-src 'self' donate.stripe.com forms.office.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.google-analytics.com https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google.com https://google.com;
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), camera=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
